import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, hidden_size=1024, num_layers=2, dropout=0.5, embed_size=320):
        super(DKT, self).__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed_size = embed_size
        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
        self.num_layers = num_layers
        self.dropout = dropout
        self.interaction_embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_size)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(
            embed_size, hidden_size, num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0,
            bidirectional=False
        )
        self.dropout_layer = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_size, num_skills)
        self.sigmoid = nn.Sigmoid()

    def forward(self, x):
        embed = self.interaction_embed(x)
        lstm_out, _ = self.lstm(embed)
        lstm_out = self.dropout_layer(lstm_out)
        out = self.fc(lstm_out)
        out = self.sigmoid(out)
        return out
